feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Enhance MIR7 multiple account assignment ALV
entry.content:
I want to add another column to the multiple account assignment ALV(The WBS description). Is it possible without any Repair object?
 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Replikation aus dem WM ans ERP
entry.content:
Hallo zusammen,

ich verzweifle langsam. Wir haben ein dezentrales WM im Einsatz. Beide Systeme sind R3 SAP.

Sobald eine Lieferung im WM WA-gebucht wird, wird automatisch das ein IDOC vom Nachrichtentyp SHP_OBDLV_CONFIRM_DECENTRAL erstellt und an das ERP gesendet. 

Meine Frage ist jetzt, ob es eine Möglichkeit gibt auch vor dem Warenausgang eine Replikation ans ERP zu senden, wenn sich zum Beispiel die Liefermenge ändert. 

 

Ich bin für jeden Tipp dankbar. 

Gruß

entry.title: Sospensione operazione di un ordine di produzione
entry.content:
Salve, è possibile sospendere un'operazione di un ordine di produzione per un determinato periodo di tempo?
se sì, come si fa?

entry.title: Capitalizing the entries in the Country and Region tables
entry.content:
We had a request to capitalize the entries for the descriptions in the Country and Region tables, for example changing Canada to CANADA and Alberta to ALBERTA.

Does anyone know if there are any impacts on the base SAP system if we do this? I cannot find any documentation on this.

entry.title: FIFO - valuation based on Valuation Type
entry.content:
Hi,

I activated FIFO at Company Level.

My Customer has some materials managed at Split valuation.
We have 2 split valuation: The first "VAL_COM" is valorized at standard price. The second "NN_VAL_COM" is always valorized at zero, because the stock are asset-

When I run the Tcode MRF1 the system calculate the total stock summed both of split valuation "NN_VAL_COM" and "VAL_COM". In this way the final result of FIFO is wrong.

 

 

I have seen that in the table MYMFT there is the field "Valuation Type"(BWTAR) but in my case is always blank.

 

Is there some method to exclude the stock in split valuation "NN_VAL_COM" of the FIFO Calculate or manage the calculation of FIFO split in Valuation type?

 

Thanks

entry.title: IP02 and IP10 changes effects.
entry.content:
Hello, 

My division has created second maintanance planner group, and now roughly 200 plans have to be redirected through IP02 to abovementioned group, so that newly generated PM orders would appear in IW38 for new maintanance planner.

Do I simply have to change planner group in IP02, and this would affect already scheduled (but not generated) orders? Or, after making plan changes in IP02, should I also reschedule them in IP10?

Regards,

Martin

entry.title: Curious to know if SAP is selling fresh licences of SAP ECC, Greenfield Implementations?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Curious to know if SAP is still selling the fresh licences of SAP ECC system, for Greenfield Implementations? Ideally it is sensible to opt for S4 system, if we are implementing it afresh. but, is SAP ECC system available, if I want to opt for it.?

In Specific, would like to understand, till which year, SAP ECC system is available for purchase, in case of new Greenfield implementations.! 

THIS QUESTION IS NOT ABOUT THE SUPPORT AVAILABILITY FOR SAP ECC, This is in the context of fresh implementation.

Thanks & Regards,
Satya

entry.title: Possible to change the item category when copying the line item of framework PO?
entry.content:
When copying the line items in existing framework Purchase order (item cat - B), the item category field is greyed out in the copied line and can't be edited any more. Is it possible to change by doing any configurations?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: ‘US’, when ‘ZUORA’ is sending 10 digit postal code, our system is receiving only 9 digits
entry.content: We debugged and analyzed the Idoc number-940033330 found that when ‘ZUORA’ is sending the data from their system to our system via ONEPO in our system postal code holding limit is only 9 digit in structure. Please find the below screenshot. So for company code ‘US’, when ‘ZUORA’ is sending 10 digit postal code, our system is receiving only 9 digits and 10th one digit is getting truncated just because of 9 digit holding capacity in SAP structure.

entry.title: How Disable Purchase requisition creation when a material is on a BOM but not planned by MRP.
entry.content: Disable Purchase requisition creation when a material is on a BOM but not planned by MRP. They are triggered from production orders.

entry.title: Data loading from SAP ECC to Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I'm currently working on DWH and the landscape is SAP ECC EHP8 and Datasphere without BW Bridge (because of transition to S/4HANA in near future).

I need to get data from some tables which is big enough to be replicated or persisted every day. Those tables  have "Creation date" and "Change date" fields, so I added them as remote table and created view to get only new values something like delta by date in datasource. But I found out that function in filter (like "Creation date" = CURRENT_DATE()) isn't pushed to the source system, so Datasphere get all the data from table and filter it inside itself.

I thought about custom datasources and replication flow, but it should have only one date field as delta, and I have 2 of them (because "Change date" can be empty). Another idea is to create in custom FM-based datasource and add it in dataflow. FM will have the next logic: if request contain Creation/Change date - use it, if they are empty - use current date.

Maybe there is more elegant way to solve this issue?

entry.title: Facing Disconnection from SAP application to DB for every 20 minutes
entry.content:
We are facing issue with one of the application server where for every 20 minutes the connections are getting disconnected and reconnecting and we are seeing below dumps for every 20 minute only from one app server rest other application servers are working fine.

Dumps:
DBIF_RSQL_SQL_ERROR and DBIF_RTAB_SQL_ERROR

Workprocess log
B Tue Nov 26 06:23:18 2024
B dblink[db_reconnect]: { new_reconnect_message=1
C DbSlPing(con=0) -> c1=0, orc=1403, 0=DBSL_ERR_OK
B dbcon[db_con_reconnect]: { reco_trials=3, reco_sleep_time=5
B 00: name=R/3, con_id=000000000, state=INACTIVE , tx=NO , bc=NO , hc=NO , perm=YES, reco=NO , refused_cnt =000000000, isol=DEF,
B info=NO , timeout=000, con_max=255, con_opt=255, occ=NO , prog=
B dbcon[db_con_reconnect]: } rc=0
B ***LOG BV4=> reconnect state is set for the work process [dblink 1999]
B ***LOG BYY=> work process left reconnect status [dblink 2000]
B dblink[db_reconnect]: } rc=0
M ThHdlReconnect: reconnect o.k.
B
B Tue Nov 26 06:41:18 2024
B dblink[db_reconnect]: { new_reconnect_message=1
C DbSlPing(con=0) -> c1=0, orc=1403, 0=DBSL_ERR_OK
B dbcon[db_con_reconnect]: { reco_trials=3, reco_sleep_time=5
B 00: name=R/3, con_id=000000000, state=INACTIVE , tx=NO , bc=NO , hc=NO , perm=YES, reco=NO , refused_cnt =000000000, isol=DEF,
B info=NO , timeout=000, con_max=255, con_opt=255, occ=NO , prog=
B dbcon[db_con_reconnect]: } rc=0
B ***LOG BV4=> reconnect state is set for the work process [dblink 1999]
B ***LOG BYY=> work process left reconnect status [dblink 2000]
B dblink[db_reconnect]: } rc=0
M ThHdlReconnect: reconnect o.k.

There is no firewall configured between APP to DB and ping test is fine and ran niping as well it looks fine
But for every 20 minutes exact the connection are getting reset

entry.title: Error when upgrading SAP_ABA componment sp15
entry.content:
hi Community

When updating SAP_ABA componment i'm faced with the error :


- Error in phase: IMPORT_PROPER

- Reason for error: TP_STEP_FAILURE

- Return code: 0008

- Error message: OCS Package ALL, tp step "S", return code 0008

with this message when expand log file

Function FSBP_DBREAD_BKK21 (FSBP_READ_INBOUND|12) does not fit into the existing function group ((FBB1_ABA|03))....

Any issue ???

entry.title: CNMASSCREATE
entry.content: I am working with CNMASSCREATE. I have been able to create the project definition without any problem. I have had problems creating the TOP, but I have been able to create it. But I cannot create the lower level WBS. The curious thing is that when I execute the transaction, it shows me warnings due to differences between project calendars that are different from the factory calendar of the center, bur no errors. But in CJ20N, these lower level WBS do not appear to be created. Does anyone know why this happens?

entry.title: SAM MM
entry.content:
In rounding profile 5000, quota 70:30 - planned deliveries does not respect quota in case rounding profile in maintained.
if we use rounding profile only in quota arrangement, the quota 30% for 2nd supplier is not considered (higher quantity than 1st supplier).
If I set up 5000 pcs for both, only 1st suppliers is planned. I don't understand that...
Can anyone provide solution how to set quota for this schenerio.

entry.title: Advice Needed: SAP ABAP vs. SAP FI for a Quick Career Entry
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I’m about to finish my Master’s degree in Computer Science and preparing for my entry into the job market. I have 6 months of experience in SAP ABAP and have also completed an intensive 3-month SAP FI course.

Now, I’m wondering which path would be better for a quick entry into the job market—should I focus on ABAP, or continue with SAP FI? Has anyone had a similar background or can share recommendations?

I appreciate any advice and insights!

Best regards,
Imad

entry.title: Is there a warning/error screen for trying to adjust qty from the previous month?
entry.content: Hello, SAP community! I was wondering if there is an error message or warning screen that will display when trying to adjust a previous months quantity/SLOC I've seen it before where SAP will display "Can't adjust prevous month etc" I need to know how to bring this screen up.

entry.title: Canada tax procedure
entry.content:
Hi, 

There is a requirement where company code for europe and Canada would be same. And company code belongs to UAE for tax saving purpose.

Now the issue is if company code belongs to UAE then conditions type of tax for Canada like JRC1 JRC2 ect is not getting triggered because system can't read TAXCAJ ( with Jurisdiction code) tax procedure where Tax condition type got assigned, also these conditions are maintained in FTXP with tax code and also  conditions record will get upated in FV11.

These conditions type should work for different company code , so to achieve this could you please help me to get solution?

entry.title: Period 13 for GL posting adjustment
entry.content:
Question on period 13 , for year 2023 . Please help and educate me on period 13 functionality. I understand that posting to period 13 is possible which we can see it in FS10N under period 13.

But please help on below queries: 

  1. Is it a continuation from period 12 of the ledger with all the balances carried forward?
  2. Can we post reversals/adjustment in period 13 without impacting the 2023 closing position?
  3. Is it possible to run revaluation ?

entry.title: S/4HANA - XSA Integration with Adobe Document Services
entry.content: Other than a single SAP blog post I have been unable to find further documentation on what is and is not supported with Adobe Document Services running off the XSA of a S4 HANA instance. Can you please direct me to any OSS notes/documents on this matter?
